highlights.title: Amazon Prepares to Issue Its First Swiss Franc Bond in AI Push
highlights.description: Amazon.com, Inc. is preparing to issue Swiss franc bonds for the first time, as Big Tech hyperscalers turn to new debt markets to fund artificial intelligence spending.

highlights.title: SoftBank Preps Forays Into AI Data Center Batteries and Chips
highlights.description: SoftBank Group Corp.’s mobile unit plans to expand into selling AI computing power and the manufacture of large-scale battery cells to address growing demand for AI-related hardware.

highlights.title: Goldman Sees ‘AI-Driven Super Surplus’ Swelling in Korea, Taiwan
highlights.description: South Korea and Taiwan’s artificial intelligence-fueled chip booms are set to swell both economies’ current-account surpluses to fresh records and pressure their central banks to raise interest rates later this year.

highlights.title: South Korea Exploring Using Hyundai Robots as Army Numbers Fall
highlights.description: South Korea’s military is exploring a strategic partnership with Hyundai Motor Co. to potentially deploy robotics to the front lines as Seoul accelerates investment in AI-powered, unmanned systems to tackle a deepening troop shortage.

highlights.title: ASIA IN BRIEF: China’s agentic AI policy wants to keep humans in the loop
highlights.description: PLUS: Robot becomes Buddhist monk in Korea; TikTok spending $25bn in Thailand; Baidu floating chip biz; and more!

highlights.title: A $400 AI Bet That’s Actually a High-Stakes Wager on the Future of Work
highlights.description: Two prominent economists differ on how quickly artificial intelligence will reshape the US job market.

highlights.title: Emerging-Market Stocks Set for Record High on Technology Rally
highlights.description: Emerging-market equities rose, with artificial intelligence-related stocks keeping the benchmark buoyant as stalled peace talks between the US and Iran pushed up oil prices. Most developing-nation currencies weakened against the dollar.

highlights.title: JPMorgan Says Equities at All-Time Highs 'Make Sense'
highlights.description: Grace Peters, global investment strategy co-head at JPMorgan Private Bank, discusses artificial intelligence investment, inflation risks and portfolio diversification. "We want to be in there for the equity bull market that we still see ahead, but we do think that there's still portfolio resilience that needed to be added to capitalize on some of these trends," Peters tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

highlights.title: Pictet Fund Plows 30% of Cash Into AI Stocks on Risk Revival
highlights.description: A $3.5 billion multi-asset fund at Pictet Asset Management has sharply raised its equity exposure, shifting as much as 30% of its cash-equivalent holdings into artificial-intelligence heavyweights across Asia and the US.

highlights.title: Africa’s CEOs Warn Online Gambling Is Draining Customer Wallets
highlights.description: Africa’s growing gambling use is sapping income that would ordinarily be flowing into groceries, entertainment and mobile phone bills.
